name: T'nalak Woven Bag
description: Handwoven bag using traditional T'nalak fabric by T'boli artisans of Lake Sebu. Each piece features unique dreamwoven patterns passed down through generations. Made from abaca fiber with genuine leather straps.

name: Davao Durian Candy
description: Premium durian candy made from 100% Davao durian. Perfect pasalubong that captures the authentic flavor of the King of Fruits without the strong aroma. Available in original and chocolate-coated varieties.

name: Maranao Brass Tray
description: Intricately designed brass tray featuring traditional Maranao okir motifs. Each piece is handcrafted by skilled artisans from Lanao del Sur using techniques passed down for centuries.

name: Bukidnon Honey (500ml)
description: Pure, raw honey harvested from the highlands of Bukidnon. Our bees forage on wildflowers and coffee blossoms, giving this honey a uniquely complex flavor. No additives, no processing.

name: Mindanao Coffee Sampler
description: A curated set of 4 single-origin coffees from across Mindanao: Bukidnon Arabica, Davao Robusta, Cotabato Liberica, and a special Civet blend. Freshly roasted and ground to order.

name: Tribal Print Eco Shirt
description: Sustainably made t-shirt featuring authentic Mindanao tribal print designs. Made from organic cotton and eco-friendly dyes. Each purchase supports indigenous communities.

name: Homestay: Bamboo Cottage
description: Cozy bamboo cottage overlooking Cagayan de Oro river. Includes breakfast, WiFi, and access to our organic garden. Perfect for travelers seeking an authentic local experience.

name: Sunset Kayak Experience
description: 2-hour guided kayaking experience along the coast of Samal Island during golden hour. Includes kayak rental, safety gear, and a local guide. Witness Davao Gulf's stunning sunset from the water.
